intro: Acorus calamus tincture, also known as calamus tincture, is a herbal remedy derived from the roots of the Acorus calamus plant. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine, it is said to possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful for digestive issues, anxiety, and skin problems. However, it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using acorus calamus tincture, as its use can be associated with potential side effects and interactions with certain medications.
